description_long: This futuristic jet ski features a sleek, angular design with wide, wing-like side panels and a central cockpit. The body is predominantly gray with black and metallic accents, giving it a high-tech, armored appearance. The front showcases a streamlined nose with integrated lights and a small emblem, while the rear reveals dual jet propulsion units and a visible red interior component. The cockpit is enclosed with a transparent canopy, and the handlebar area is partially visible, suggesting advanced controls. The side panels are detailed with geometric patterns and appear to house additional mechanical components or storage. The overall build suggests a high-performance, urban watercraft designed for speed and maneuverability.
description: A sleek, angular jet ski with wide side panels, a central cockpit, and dual rear jet propulsion units, finished in gray and black with metallic details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the streamlined nose, integrated lights, and central cockpit with a visible emblem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated body, wing-like side panels, and partially visible cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dual jet propulsion units, a red interior component, and the wide stance of the side panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit and mechanical details on the side panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white, diamond-shaped emblem is visible on the front of the cockpit, centered above the nose.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is compact and integrated into the cockpit, with dark grips and a streamlined, angular structure; controls appear to be embedded within easy reach.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat is a single, contoured unit designed for one rider, finished in dark material with visible ergonomic shaping for comfort and support.
